headline: 3M Partners With JetZero To Reshape Aviation
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / March 18, 2026 /Originally published on 3M News Center 3M has announced an investment and strategic collaboration with JetZero, an aerospace innovator developing the world's first commercial all-wing body aircraft. ...
